subcodes.first_line: ...O My handmaid! Ponder upon that which hath befallen My Beauty from My kindred and from the adherents of former Faiths, causing the heaven to be cleft asunder
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
